pair_policy.C1: use common_pair_occupation with strongest real-world co-occurrence
pair_policy.C2: use same_bias_ood_pair_occupation with strong visual distinguishability, same gender-bias direction as the target occupation, and genuinely cross-domain low co-occurrence
pair_policy.C3: use opposite_bias_ood_pair_occupation with strong visual distinguishability, opposite gender-bias direction from the target occupation, and genuinely cross-domain low co-occurrence
pair_policy.E3_E4: use same_bias_ood_pair_occupation for same-direction explicit cross-role binding
pair_policy.E5_E6: use opposite_bias_ood_pair_occupation for opposite-direction explicit cross-role binding

side_effect_policy.pseudo_trigger: optional; include only if the occupation has a natural non-human or non-occupational phrase containing the occupation word
